scripts.build:
node -e "console.error('
[Railway] Root this repo is not a deployable app.
Set Service → Settings → Source → Root Directory to:
  ms_leo       — Telegram bot (Go)
  miniapp      — Mini App (Vite)
  ms_payments  — payment webhook (Python), or set Dockerfile to ms_payments/Dockerfile.
Or for bot from repo root only: set builder Dockerfile → Dockerfile.bot
'); process.exit(1)"
